channel.title: Featherweight
channel.description: Featherweight is an ultra-lightweight Jekyll theme, aiming to minimise bandwidth usage and deliver a bare-bones experience.

item.title: Developing a lightweight theme for Jekyll.
item.description: Featherweight was inspired by pages from the 1kb club, a list of web pages weighing less than 1kb. In order to provide a feature-complete static blog experience, cosmetic features were added, but the minimalist experience can still achieve < 1kb weight.
